title: Theme Switcher
description: Create a theme switcher that toggles between light and dark themes by updating CSS custom properties via JavaScript.
hint: Declare all colors as variables on :root, then use setProperty() to switch them.

title: Scoped Component Variables
description: Build a reusable card component that uses scoped CSS variables, allowing each instance to customize its appearance via inline style or data attributes.
hint: Use default variables in the component, then override them on individual instances.

title: Responsive Spacing System
description: Create a responsive spacing system where spacing variables change based on viewport size using media queries.
hint: Override spacing variables inside media query blocks to scale all spacing proportionally.
criteria: Multiple elements use the spacing variables

title: Dynamic Color Palette Generator
description: Build a tool that generates a full color palette from a single primary color variable, using CSS calc() and hsl() to derive complementary, lighter, and darker shades.
hint: Store hue as a variable and use calc() with hsl() to generate the palette dynamically.
criteria: Derived colors using calc() and hsl()
